name: Ubiquiti Camera AI LPR Black
title: Ubiquiti Camera AI LPR Black
short_description: Professional 4K (8MP) license plate recognition (LPR) camera with AI-driven vehicle identification, 3x optical zoom, long-range IR night vision, and IP66 weatherproof housing.
description: The Ubiquiti Camera AI LPR Black (UVC-AI-LPR-B) is designed to provide exceptional image quality, ensuring precise and accurate license plate recognition (LPR) in high-traffic areas, capturing clear images of vehicles moving at speeds of up to 90 km/h. Equipped with a high-resolution 4K (8MP) sensor, the camera captures clear and detailed images, allowing for effective monitoring of vehicles. The advanced optics include a 3x optical zoom, enabling users to focus on specific areas while maintaining superior image clarity. This zoom capability is particularly useful for situations requiring a closer look at moving vehicles or distant objects. The camera's long-range infrared (IR) night vision ensures effective performance even in low-light or nighttime conditions, providing continuous monitoring around the clock. Its AI-driven LPR functionality enhances security operations by automating vehicle identification, reducing manual intervention, and improving efficiency.

detailed_description.heading: License Plate Recognition
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Camera AI LPR Black (UVC-AI-LPR-B) is designed to provide exceptional image quality, ensuring precise and accurate license plate recognition (LPR) in high-traffic areas, capturing clear images of vehicles moving at speeds of up to 90 km/h. Equipped with a high-resolution 4K (8MP) sensor, the camera captures clear and detailed images, allowing for effective monitoring of vehicles. The advanced optics include a 3x optical zoom, enabling users to focus on specific areas while maintaining superior image clarity. This zoom capability is particularly useful for situations requiring a closer look at moving vehicles or distant objects. The camera's long-range infrared (IR) night vision ensures effective performance even in low-light or nighttime conditions, providing continuous monitoring around the clock. Its AI-driven LPR functionality enhances security operations by automating vehicle identification, reducing manual intervention, and improving efficiency.

detailed_description.heading: Comprehensive Coverage
detailed_description.text: Designed to monitor multiple traffic lanes simultaneously, the UVC-AI-LPR-B provides extensive coverage, making it suitable for highways, parking lots, and commercial areas. It can efficiently track up to two lanes at once, ensuring seamless vehicle monitoring without blind spots. In addition to video surveillance, the camera is equipped with an integrated microphone for audio recording, adding an extra layer of situational awareness. Audio monitoring enhances investigative capabilities, providing context to visual footage and aiding in event analysis. The ability to record both video and audio makes this camera a powerful tool for law enforcement, facility security, and traffic management. This dual-functionality ensures a more comprehensive security approach, offering valuable insights in case of disputes or incidents.

detailed_description.heading: Weatherproof Design
detailed_description.text: Engineered for outdoor deployment, the UVC-AI-LPR-B is built with durability in mind. The combination of aluminum alloy and polycarbonate provides a rugged design, while the IP66 weatherproof housing protects against dust, rain and extreme weather conditions. With a size of 130 x 151.4 x 302.9 mm and a weight of 1.5 kg, the camera is built for secure mounting and durability in demanding conditions. The camera operates reliably in adverse weather conditions, ensuring uninterrupted security surveillance and providing users with peace of mind that their monitoring system remains functional and effective. With its ability to produce high-definition video, the UVC-AI-LPR-B is ideal for environments such as parking lots, toll booths, and security checkpoints, where precise monitoring is essential for effective access control and vehicle tracking.
